title: CLACKAMAS COUNTY VETERANS EMPLOYMENT PROGRAM - 211info
text: EARLY LEARNING HUB OF CLACKAMAS COUNTY CLACKAMAS COUNTY VETERANS EMPLOYMENT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides employment services to veterans and education to employers on the benefits of hiring veterans. Serves as a vehicle for connecting employers to skilled veterans. 821 Main Street Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: Veterans who have served in a war, or have recently separated from service, have service-connected disabilities, or have significant barriers to employment. Hours: Monday-Thursday 7am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (503) 650-4678 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 650-4678 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Verification of veteran status LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located next to the Oregon City Transit Center on Main Street between 10th Street and 11th Street. TriMet bus lines 31, 32, 33, 34 ,35, 99, 154, and CAT (Canby Area Transit). Services: Veteran Employment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - EARLY CHILDHOOD AND FAMILY ADVISORY GROUPS EMPLOYMENT - CHILDREN FAMILY & COMMUNITY CONNECTIONS FOR CLACKAMAS COUNTY INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CLACKAMAS EARLY LEARNING HUB PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - PRESCHOOL PROMISE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. EARLY LEARNING HUB OF CLACKAMAS COUNTY
